name: gemini-watermark-remover
description: A high-performance, 100% client-side tool for removing Gemini AI watermarks. Built with pure JavaScript, it leverages a mathematically precise Reverse Alpha Blending algorithm rather than unpredictable AI inpainting. / 基于 Javascript 的纯浏览器端 Gemini AI 图像无损去水印工具，使用数学精确的反向 Alpha 混合算法
